requirement_topic.en: Tuvalu TEC Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 240/415 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 图瓦卢TEC并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及240/415 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 圖瓦盧TEC併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及240/415 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Tuvalu should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to Tuvalu Electricity Corporation (TEC) technical review and Tuvalu Department of Energy energy-sector oversight. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Tuvalu' 240/415 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Tuvalu uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Tuvalu is 240 V single-phase and 415 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. The country is an Pacific island state with a strong solar push and coastal exposure, so commissioning files should also document thermal and salt-mist derating assumptions for the installed site.
summary.zh: 图瓦卢并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，接受Tuvalu Electricity Corporation（TEC）技术审查及Tuvalu Department of Energy（DoE）能源监管。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对图瓦卢240/415 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。图瓦卢与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：图瓦卢为单相240 V、三相415 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。图瓦卢是太平洋岛屿国家，积极推进太阳能且存在沿海暴露，调试文件还应记录安装现场的热降额和盐雾降额假设。
summary.zht: 圖瓦盧併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，接受Tuvalu Electricity Corporation（TEC）技術審查及Tuvalu Department of Energy（DoE）能源監管。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對圖瓦盧240/415 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。圖瓦盧與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：圖瓦盧為單相240 V、三相415 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。圖瓦盧是太平洋島嶼國家，積極推動太陽能且存在沿海暴露，調試文件還應記錄安裝現場的熱降額和鹽霧降額假設。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
TEC project grid-connection and commissioning requirements for the relevant installation
DoE electricity-sector approval or oversight requirements where applicable
Tuvalu low-voltage grid context — 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Tuvalu' 240/415 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to TEC acceptance or DoE project review in Tuvalu.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非图瓦卢50 Hz、240/415 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为TEC认可或DoE项目审查证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非圖瓦盧50 Hz、240/415 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為TEC認可或DoE項目審查證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Tuvalu TEC project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Tuvalu-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 240/415 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Tuvalu voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For coastal or island-grid sites, include salt-mist, humidity, thermal derating, earthing, surge protection, and weak-grid ride-through assumptions in the project file.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代图瓦卢TEC项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、图瓦卢专用设置文件以及240/415 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称图瓦卢电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。对于沿海或岛屿电网现场，项目文件应包括盐雾、湿度、热降额、接地、浪涌保护和弱电网穿越假设。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代圖瓦盧TEC項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、圖瓦盧專用設置文件以及240/415 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱圖瓦盧電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。對於沿海或島嶼電網現場，項目文件應包括鹽霧、濕度、熱降額、接地、浪湧保護和弱電網穿越假設。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through TEC technical review and any applicable DoE project approval or oversight
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not a TEC Tuvalu approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Tuvalu TEC grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Tuvalu' 240/415 V at 50 Hz grid, and document salt-mist and thermal derating for coastal installation. Verify current TEC and DoE project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足图瓦卢TEC并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为图瓦卢240/415 V、50 Hz电网，并记录沿海安装的盐雾和热降额。出货或调试前请直接核实现行TEC和DoE项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足圖瓦盧TEC併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為圖瓦盧240/415 V、50 Hz電網，並記錄沿海安裝的鹽霧和熱降額。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行TEC和DoE項目要求。
